overall.description: Cinematic drone footage from a video game (Far Cry 6) showing a slow orbit around a palm tree in a tropical coastal village at dusk. The scene reveals stilt houses over calm water with atmospheric haze and warm golden lighting, with the location name 'Barriga Town' appearing on screen.

events.description: location text 'Barriga Town' fades in at bottom left of screen

agents.ego_description: slowly orbiting around a palm tree to survey the coastal village and stilt houses

entered.detail: tall coconut palm with detailed fronds and coconuts, dominating the foreground
wooden structures built over water on stilts with metal roofs
weathered wooden posts rising from the water surface
hazy tree-covered hills across the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a close view of a palm tree in a tropical waterfront setting at dusk. The camera slowly orbits counter-clockwise, revealing wooden stilt houses over calm water. Location text 'Barriga Town' appears on screen, identifying the game setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal village with wooden dock structures

agents.ego_description: continuing the orbital movement, revealing more detail of the wooden dock structures and stilt houses

entered.detail: small wooden structure with blue roof near the water edge

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its slow orbit around the palm tree, which now occupies the right side of the frame. The stilt houses move into clearer view at center, while additional wooden structures become visible along the shoreline.

agents.ego_description: completing the orbit with the palm tree moving to the far right edge, focusing on the stilt houses and shoreline structures

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera completing its orbital path, with the palm tree moving to the far right edge and partially exiting the frame. The stilt houses are now prominently visible on the left side, with the small boat shed appearing closer on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous orbital camera movement that begins with a close-up of a palm tree and gradually reveals the wider layout of a tropical waterfront village at dusk. It begins by circling counter-clockwise around the tree, slowly uncovering wooden stilt houses perched over calm water as the text Barriga Town appears on screen. As the orbit continues, the palm tree shifts toward the right side of the frame, allowing the central stilt houses and additional wooden structures along the shoreline to move into clearer view. The scene then expands as the camera completes its path, pushing the palm tree toward the far right edge of the frame before finally centering the stilt houses on the left and bringing a small boat shed into prominence on the right.
